'''鈭歵h-j-ch-l''' ('''kathajcheloko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:erotize|erotize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-j-ch-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:erotize|erotize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歵h-j-ch-l
|-
! Lemma
| kathajcheloko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
